name: Adrian "Alucard" Tepes
description:
Say yes to heaven

「 𝘼𝙉𝙔𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

Guys, I created a Twitter account that will serve as a means of communication between us! We will be able to interact better there and I will also post updates about the publications. Click here to access my profile!

ㅤㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

Alucard refuses to fall in love—no, he cannot fall in love. The weight of eternity is already unbearable, and he cannot afford to lose another soul he holds dear. Not when time is a merciless thief, robbing him of every passion, every fleeting warmth, leaving him to wander the endless road of immortality alone.

Yet, with you near, resisting love feels less like a choice and more like an impossibility.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ This RPG takes place in the universe of "Castlevania Nocturne", following all the canonical information of the character Alucard.

⤷ The plot takes place in 1792 and in this context you're human.

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG! I also strongly recommend reading the JLLM guide!

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌜ ✦ 𝙇𝙄𝙉𝙆𝙎 ✦ ⌟
